description_long: This is a standard orange traffic cone with a conical body and a square, black base. The cone features two wide, white reflective stripes encircling its upper and middle sections, which are slightly scuffed and show signs of use. The orange surface of the cone is matte and displays some visible wear, including smudges and faded areas, particularly near the base. The base is flat, sturdy, and appears to be made of a heavier material to provide stability, with a slightly textured finish. The tip of the cone is solid and rounded, maintaining the same orange color as the rest of the cone. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: An orange traffic cone with two wide white reflective stripes and a sturdy black base, showing signs of light wear and scuffing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two white reflective stripes and visible scuff marks near the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the same two white stripes and a slightly different pattern of wear on the orange surface.
description_view_2: Another angled view with the white stripes and more pronounced smudging on the lower part of the cone.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the orange cone, white stripes, and a relatively clean surface with less visible wear.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, white reflective stripes encircle the upper and middle sections of the cone, each approximately 10-12 cm in width.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is solid, rounded, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, black, flat, and appears thick and weighted for stability, with a slightly textured surface.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
attribute_condition: Lightly used, with visible scuff marks, smudges, and some fading, but no major damage.
